global_summary: This week needs 120 of 138 work-days company-wide, but only 31 are earned and none of three due starts began. Every project missed last week (Jul 6-12). Push rough-ins and trims hardest — most jobs are behind but several weeks are still savable.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind this week's plan — none of 8 due work-days earned, slip 23%. Install kitchen cabinets and pulls now, and tiles by Fri Jul 24.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Week still savable but at risk — 10 of 24 due work-days done, slip 62%. Finish painting by Sat Jul 18 plus gutters and cleaning to hold the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Behind this week's plan — none of 4 due work-days earned, slip 79%. Bricks are paid; install them and glass, now due Tue Jul 21.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Behind this week's plan — 4 of 21 due work-days done, slip 46%, nothing finished yet. Install tiles by Fri Jul 17, then plumbing trim.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slip: 27% of the month plan (12.0 of 21.0 expected work-days done; 3/15 tasks). Key move: PROJECT CLEANING - FRAMING: PROJECT CLEANING / HAUL (Thu Jul 30 → Mon Aug 10, +11d).

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Behind this week's plan — 4 of 20 due work-days done, slip 33%. Finish cabinet paint and install plumbing, mechanical, electrical trim; mechanical sub onsite Mon Jul 20.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Behind this week's plan — 4 of 12 due work-days earned, slip 22%. Pass framing and MEP rough-in inspection Mon Jul 20 before insulation can start.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Nearly on pace — 3 of 5 due work-days earned, slip just 8%. Finish drywall texture by Fri Jul 17 and start interior paint by Sat Jul 18.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Week still savable — 5 of 19 due work-days earned, slip 35%. Finish plumbing, electrical and mechanical rough-ins by Sat Jul 18 to hold the week.
